message:
refactor(tests,bd-ju50o): consolidate cass_bin() into tests/util/mod.rs

Pre-consolidation: fn cass_bin() -> String was byte-identical (5
lines, same CARGO_BIN_EXE_cass env lookup with env!() fallback) in
three integration test files: tests/cli_robot.rs:16,
tests/e2e_full_integration.rs:94, tests/watch_e2e.rs:9. A future
change to how the runtime binary path resolves (e.g. a new env knob
for rch workers, a cross-compile path override) would need to touch
all three.

Moved the canonical version into tests/util/mod.rs behind
#[allow(dead_code)] (existing pattern for shared test helpers). The
three callers now `use util::cass_bin;`. cli_robot.rs and
watch_e2e.rs gained a `mod util;` line; e2e_full_integration.rs
already had one.

Scope note: ju50o also called out `isolated_cass_cmd(home)` as
duplicated between tests/e2e_health.rs and tests/cli_robot.rs. Those
two callers build assert_cmd::Command while the analogous helpers in
std-Command files would need std::process::Command; a type-stable
consolidation needs an assert_cmd-flavored variant alongside the std
one. Tracked for a follow-up slice rather than forcing a lossy
.into() cast across the current call sites.

Validation: cargo check --tests passes; cargo fmt --check clean.

Closes coding_agent_session_search-ju50o.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,32 @@ pub mod e2e_log;
 pub mod search_asset_simulation;
 pub mod timeout;
 
+// =============================================================================
+// Shared CLI-invocation helpers (bead coding_agent_session_search-ju50o)
+// =============================================================================
+//
+// Before consolidation, `cass_bin()` was byte-identical in cli_robot.rs,
+// e2e_full_integration.rs, and watch_e2e.rs. Housing the canonical version
+// here means a future env-isolation requirement (or a change to how the
+// runtime binary path is resolved) gets one touch instead of three.
+//
+// Scope note: the `isolated_cass_cmd(home)` duplication called out in
+// ju50o is tracked separately. Two of its four callers build
+// `assert_cmd::Command` and two build `std::process::Command`, so a
+// type-stable consolidation needs an assert_cmd-flavored variant alongside
+// the std one — deferred to a follow-up slice rather than jamming a
+// lossy `.into()` cast across the current call sites.
+
+/// Resolve the `cass` binary path. Prefers the runtime `CARGO_BIN_EXE_cass`
+/// env var (set when cargo runs integration tests) and falls back to the
+/// compile-time path from `env!()`.
+#[allow(dead_code)]
+pub fn cass_bin() -> String {
+    std::env::var("CARGO_BIN_EXE_cass")
+        .ok()
+        .unwrap_or_else(|| env!("CARGO_BIN_EXE_cass").to_string())
+}
+
 // =============================================================================
 // Verbose Logging Support
 // =============================================================================
